rationale: Fin. Code §201.002 is a definitions provision for banking and financial institutions. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemptions, so no conflict arises.
quote: Sec. 201.002. DEFINITIONS. (a) Unless the context requires otherwise, in this subtitle:
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed property-tax homestead exemption change; no conflict identified.
